pi_items.source: Web search results indicating W1AW FRN is 0004511143, registered to ARRL HQ Operators Club with Joseph P. Carcia III as trustee
Multiple web searches for W6YX FRN returned no results for this specific number. FCC ULS database pages exist (license key 815069) but specific FRN cannot be extracted from public search results.
Both W1AW and W6YX are confirmed as real, operational amateur radio stations actively transmitting. W1AW license issued 2020-12-08, expires 2031-02-26.
FCC Universal Licensing System (ULS) database confirmed at wireless2.fcc.gov/UlsApp/UlsSearch/ for both W1AW (licKey=780866) and W6YX (licKey=815069)
Consistent with task specification. Verified in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which reference this exact path.
Task description requires creating Firefox bookmark folder with this exact name. Verified in export_result.sh which queries SQLite for folder name.

privileged_info_summary: W1AW and W6YX are confirmed real, active amateur radio licenses issued by the FCC. W1AW (ARRL HQ Operators Club in Newington, CT) has FRN 0004511143 and was licensed 2020-12-08, expiring 2031-02-26. The task claims W1AW FRN is 0002534816, which contradicts the verified value of 0004511143. W6YX is the Stanford Amateur Radio Club license (FCC license key 815069), and both stations maintain active operational status. The FCC ULS database is accessible at wireless2.fcc.gov as claimed.
